EmailTemplate.name: Salesforce to Salesforce: Acceptance (SAMPLE)
EmailTemplate.subject: You're now connected to {!Organization.Name} in Salesforce
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Connection_ExternalContactFirstName},
{!User.FirstName} {!User.LastName} at {!Organization.Name} has accepted your invitation to connect in Salesforce to Salesforce!
You can now share records with each other. Updates to shared records are automatically synced.
Thank you,
The Salesforce Team
